title: Operational Logging Best Practices
when_to_use: Use this recipe when operational logging best practices is required. This advanced recipe covers professional-grade techniques suitable for experienced red teamers. Applicable to missions: OA-M12.

steps.title: Step 1: Operational Logging Best Practices
steps.instruction: Execute step 1 of the Operational Logging Best Practices recipe. Follow the detailed procedures for this advanced technique. Ensure all prerequisites are met and tools are properly configured.
steps.tip: Follow best practices and maintain detailed logs of all activities for later analysis.
